title: Resolution Expressing Sincerest Appreciation and Deepest Gratitude of the Sangguniang Bayan of Los Baños to the Different Organizations in Los Baños for Their Help in Retrieval Operations for the Bodies of Richard Gaylon, Renato Gaylon and John Lourence Escala Who Died in a Boat Accident on May 1, 2021.(AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) Miko C. Pelegrina, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon,cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozylyn N. Mana
